title: methods: write wiremock fixture tests for all existing methods
description:
For every currently-implemented method in methods.rs, write a wiremock integration test:
- Start wiremock server, register stub that returns spec-example JSON fixture
- Call the method under test
- Assert the returned Rust struct matches expected values

Fixture files: crates/jmap-chat/tests/fixtures/<method-name>.json
Each fixture is hand-written JSON derived directly from spec examples (never generated from the code under test).

Methods to cover: chat_get, chat_query, chat_changes, message_get, message_query, message_changes, message_create, chat_contact_get, read_position_get, read_position_set, presence_status_get
